summary: away marks cancelled games with [CANCELLED] (parity with eventRow/next); since-snapshot path is scoped per club via clubKeyFromBaseURL so multi-club runs no longer overwrite each other and report spurious 'Added'.
reason: Third review round found two real output defects: away's carpool list silently included cancelled games, and the since snapshot was club-agnostic (a regression from the SPROCKET_CLUB multi-club enhancement).
validated_outcome: go test ./internal/cli/... passes incl. TestAwayRowMarksCancelled, TestClubKeyFromBaseURL.
